query:
INSERT INTO testimonials (name, initial, date, title, text, featured, displayOrder, category) VALUES
('Nicole', 'N', 'August 7, 2022', 'Changed Life', 'When I first started with Jeff I was a total wreck. Working myself to death, family issues, anger issues and so much more. He has helped me become a stable person that look at life in a total different mirror nowadays. This is the best money that I have spent and can\'t wait to see how much further this ride will take me. Thanks Jeff!', 0, 9, NULL),
('Jonathan', 'J', 'July 15, 2022', 'Gratitude', 'I\'ve been coming to Jeff for counseling and coaching for many years now. I have also tried other therapists and counselors occasionally but Jeff\'s insight has most consistently had a profound and long term impact on my life and state of mind. One of the things I most appreciate about Jeff is his process- he\'s there to facilitate YOUR awakening/understanding ... not just give a quick answer or fix. I\'ve introduced Jeff to literally a dozen or more of my close friends and watched over and over again how he has had a profoundly positive impact on their lives as well.', 1, 10, 'long-term'),
('Dallas', 'D', 'July 14, 2022', 'Godsend!', 'Jeff is an absolute godsend. So far we\'ve had two counseling sessions and it has changed the dynamic of our marriage in so many positive ways. Before we started talking with Jeffrey our marriage was in shambles and on the way to divorce court. Thank you Jeffrey for everything and we look forward to working with you further.', 1, 11, 'couples'),
('April', 'A', 'July 12, 2022', 'Bright side of things...', 'The sessions with Jeff have been very positive and enlightening. Highly recommend if you have a goal to see the bright side of things in life.', 0, 12, NULL),
('Meghan', 'M', 'July 12, 2022', 'Jeff and his work have been so instrumental in my healing', 'Jeff and his work have been so instrumental in my healing and self work. His guidance and tools have changed my life and I am forever grateful for what he has taught me. I have a new perspective on life and am happier than I have ever been thanks to working with Jeff. He has done the work himself so he has an amazing understanding of how to connect with you in a real way.', 0, 13, NULL),
('Emily', 'E', 'June 2, 2022', 'Truly life changing', 'I\'ve only worked with Jeff a few times but I have utilized his teachings consistently. I feel like I\'m out here spreading the gospel, telling all my friends to call him. Life coaching has been far more transformative for me than counseling. If you\'re wondering if it\'s worth it, I promise you, it\'s worth every penny. Just like athletes need coaching, sometimes the mind does too.', 0, 14, NULL),
('Jamie', 'J', 'May 28, 2022', 'Life Changing', 'I can honestly say that over the past 2 years Jeff has helped me totally transform the way I think and my approach to life\'s difficulties. Going through a marital separation can be a vortex leading downwards but Jeff has shown me that I can actually use this experience to discover \'abundant life\' within me which totally flips the negative into an amazing positive! Being fairly stubborn and rigid in my thinking, I never imagined someone could help me see things totally differently.', 0, 15, NULL),
('Emilia', 'E', 'May 25, 2022', 'Awesome!', 'Jeff\'s bright and kind smile made me feel at ease immediately. Since taking his advice, my day to day experiences are rich with awareness. I am making better choices and feeling GOOD.', 0, 16, NULL);
